title: game_iso_v1 sprite manifest — engine-consumed contract (v1)
description: The fields the engine loader (crates/client_bevy/src/sprite.rs :: parse_manifest) reads and validates. additionalProperties is TRUE everywhere: the pipeline may emit more (sockets, states, hit boxes, build/lockfile metadata) and the engine ignores the extras (forward-compatible). CROSS-FIELD RULES the schema cannot express, enforced by the loader: (1) `frames` MUST contain exactly `direction_count` entries, covering directions 0..direction_count-1 uniquely (no gaps, no dupes). (2) Each frame `rect` w,h MUST be > 0. Elevation correctness (camera_elevation_degrees == 30 = arcsin(0.5); 26.565 = arctan(0.5) is the SCREEN tile-edge angle, not the camera elevation) is a SEPARATE bake gate — see package-acceptance-and-qa.md — because the engine does not read that field and flat arrows hide it.

id.description: Format id. The engine rejects any other value.

camera_elevation_degrees.description: MUST be 30 (= arcsin(0.5)): a 2:1 ground diamond requires sin(elevation)=0.5. NOT 26.565 — that is arctan(0.5), the on-screen tile-edge angle (a screen result), not the camera elevation; see tile_edge_screen_angle_degrees. The engine does not read this field, so it is not schema-enforced, but it governs how real 3D heights foreshorten — bake character art at 30.

screen_y.description: Pipeline render convention (often "down"); the engine renders y-up and re-flips. Output frames must look correct on-screen (see the oracle).

variant_class.description: probe = debug billboard (placeholder world_metrics OK, rendered at engine defaults). character/effect = real art (world_metrics REQUIRED + valid). terrain = flat z=0 ground tile (engine ADR-053 / pipeline ADR-0006): direction_count 1, world_metrics OMITTED (not an occluder/viewer); the terrain tag IS the signal.

direction_count.description: Number of facing frames. 16 for characters. frame i = world yaw i·(360/direction_count)°, 0 = +X (East), increasing CCW.

frame_canvas.description: [w, h] of each frame's canvas in px. Anchors are expressed in these px.

path.description: Color atlas PNG path, RELATIVE TO THE MANIFEST'S OWN DIRECTORY (e.g. "color_atlas.png"). The engine re-roots it to assets/.

size.description: [w, h] of the atlas image in px.

hitmask.description: Optional hit-region mask atlas (R8). Not consumed by the engine yet (future ADR-030/031); keep emitting it.

frames.description: One entry per direction. The engine indexes by `direction` (must cover 0..direction_count-1).

direction.description: Frame's direction index. 0 = +X/East; frame i = world yaw i·(360/direction_count)°, increasing CCW.

rect.description: [x, y, w, h] placement in the color atlas, px. Explicit per-frame, so padding + extrusion are fine. w,h MUST be > 0 (loader-enforced).

anchor.description: [x, y] foot/origin in frame_canvas px (y-down). The engine stores anchor/frame_canvas as a fraction and places it on the projected ground point.

sockets.description: Optional named points in frame_canvas px. `direction_tip` + `origin` enable the direction QA: normalize(direction_tip - origin) must equal screen_direction_vector.

world_metrics.description: Model-derived metrics in world units (m), z=0 ground. REQUIRED for character/effect; a probe may placeholder/omit it.

height_world.description: Body height (m) → sim VerticalSpan.top + on-screen sprite height.

footprint_radius_world.description: Collision circle radius (m). Collision-only — does NOT size the sprite.

eye_height_world.description: Optional LOS eye height (m); MUST be ≤ height_world. Absent → engine uses 0.85·height_world.

allOf.description: world_metrics is REQUIRED for character/effect (it drives the collider + line-of-sight). A probe may omit or placeholder it; the engine then renders at visible defaults.
